architecture.root: Single monolithic App component. ALL sub-components (Card, CombatStatusPanel, CombatTopMap) and render functions (renderMenu, renderCombat, etc.) MUST remain inside the App function to share state scope and prevent React child/re-render crashes.

CARD_DB.structure: { id, name, type, cost, color, value, desc (uses [VAL] replacement), icon (Lucide component) }

SKILL_TREE_DICT.desc: Node definitions with costs, dependencies, and mutation functions for meta state

features: Monster timer ticks up, deals damage when reaching maxTimer
Player mana regens based on meta.regenRate
autoDraw and autoPlayMana logic executes here
activeEffects, enemyAttackEffects, and floatingDrops filtered by timestamp for CSS animations

card_play.logic: Deduct cost -> apply value+mods -> check monster HP. If monster dies -> calculate overkill -> award GP/Frags/Packs -> trigger deathEffect -> advance runMap nodeIndex. If next node is event, pause combat loop and set activeEvent.

progression_map.generation: Array of 1000 nodes. Boss every 5th. 5% Treasure, 5% Rest. Fixed unlocks at index 2 (Skills) and 4 (Shop). Default Encounter.
progression_map.ui: Sliding horizontal timeline (CombatTopMap) dynamically sliced to show only nodeIndex -5 to +15 to prevent DOM lag.

events.interaction: In-arena holographic sprite (Tent, Package, Key). Fully clickable hitbox. Combat paused. Cards in hand are unplayable (but can be drawn/discarded).
events.resolution: Click triggers triggerEventRewards -> spawns targeted loot fountain -> sets eventPopup data. Clicking popup button triggers closeEventPopup -> applies meta unlocks -> advances nodeIndex -> spawns next monster.

cards.border: Outer padding uses thick gradient based on type/color (CARD_BGS). Red=Atk, Green=Mana, Purple=Util, Blue=Def, Pink=Heal, Black/Purple=Void, Yellow=Lightning.
cards.foil: CSS gradient animations based on rarity (cost >=4 is legendary, 2-3 is rare).

hud.style: Unified Player/Enemy panels. Black/80 backdrop-blur, distinct cyan/red borders. Enemy intent bubble pinned to right side of sprite.

animations.loot_fountain: Dynamically spawns multiple Lucide icons (Coins, Layers, Package) mapping to reward type, plus a single text element. Uses --drop-x CSS var for randomized arcing trajectories. z-index 60 to overlay everything.

strict_constraints: Do NOT use external image URLs. Use lucide-react icons only (Valid: Bug, Ghost, Bot, Eye, Skull, Target, Crown, Flame, Zap, Hexagon, Tent, Key, Package).
Do NOT extract sub-components outside the main App() function.
Maintain strict conditional rendering for the eventPopup to ensure combat loop fully pauses.
Do NOT use `npx tailwindcss init`. Local environments must use manual tailwind.config.js creation.
